title: The Art of Writing Good Technical Documentation

questions.sentence: Good documentation is as important as good code
Effective technical writing should be clear concise and well structured
It usually includes a README file with installation instructions usage examples and a description of the projects purpose

For more complex systems you might follow the Diátaxis framework which divides documentation into four categories tutorials learning oriented how to guides problem oriented reference information oriented and explanation understanding oriented
By investing time in documentation you reduce the number of questions from teammates ensure your work remains maintainable and demonstrate a high level of professionalism and care for your craft
